actionUnits.condition: Call CheckElements.AddElementInSocket() once; numberOfElementsInSocket becomes 1 (< numberOfElements=3). No UnityEvent m_Calls should fire yet. MonoBehaviour component fileID=254571545, GUID=3bc2acd74545a4f1aa9eba6d8f72a530 is the exact attached script (CheckElements) on this GameObject.
Second call; numberOfElementsInSocket becomes 2 (< 3). Still no UnityEvent m_Calls should fire.

Third call reaches numberOfElementsInSocket == numberOfElements (3). Expect CheckElements.CheckNumberOfElements() to invoke UnityEvent m_Calls configured on MonoBehaviour fileID=254571545 (GUID=3bc2acd74545a4f1aa9eba6d8f72a530): hideTaskDescription -> GameObject(1945735948).SetActive(false), showNextLevelUI -> GameObject(208823133).SetActive(true), unlock -> GameObject(157114427).SetActive(false). Canvas refs: nextLevelUI(208823134), taskDescription(1945735953).

Simulate XRSocketInteractor m_HoverEntered on child Box_02 (PrefabInstance id=36331052). MonoBehaviour id=680431495 (GUID=60523e0647cc6ab43acc73cb266a32a7) is the XR Interaction Toolkit socket component attached to Box_02. Expect its m_Calls to invoke Renderer(fileID=680431493).set_enabled(false).

Simulate XRSocketInteractor m_SelectEntered on Box_02. This event has a PersistentCall to CheckElements.AddElementInSocket on parent '5- Box Sockets Interactors'. Parent MonoBehaviour id=254571545 (GUID=3bc2acd74545a4f1aa9eba6d8f72a530) is exactly the attached CheckElements script with numberOfElements=3. After call: numberOfElementsInSocket=1 (<3), so no parent UnityEvents fire yet.

Simulate XRSocketInteractor m_SelectExited on Box_02. PersistentCall again invokes CheckElements.AddElementInSocket (id=254571545). After call: numberOfElementsInSocket=2 (<3), still no parent UnityEvents fire.

Simulate XRSocketInteractor m_SelectEntered on Box_02 a second time to reach the required element count. After this call numberOfElementsInSocket == numberOfElements (3), so CheckElements (id=254571545) invokes its UnityEvents configured in the scene: hideTaskDescription -> GameObject(1945735948).SetActive(false); showNextLevelUI -> GameObject(208823133).SetActive(true); unlock -> GameObject(157114427).SetActive(false). Serialized UI refs: nextLevelUI(fileID=208823134), taskDescription(fileID=1945735953).

Simulate XRSocketInteractor SelectExited on 'Box_02 (3)'. PersistentCall again invokes CheckElements.AddElementInSocket (id=254571545). After call: numberOfElementsInSocket=2 (<3); still no parent UnityEvents fire.

Simulate XRSocketInteractor SelectEntered on 'Box_02 (3)' a second time to reach the required element count. After this call numberOfElementsInSocket == numberOfElements (3), so CheckElements (id=254571545) invokes its UnityEvents configured in the scene: hideTaskDescription -> GameObject(fileID=1945735948).SetActive(false); showNextLevelUI -> GameObject(fileID=208823133).SetActive(true); unlock -> GameObject(fileID=157114427).SetActive(false).
